description_long: This object is a rectangular, horizontally-oriented CD player with a flat top surface, featuring a game controller resting on it. The front face displays a series of ventilation grilles, a disc tray, and several small buttons and ports, typical of consumer electronics. The sides are ribbed with horizontal grooves, adding to the visual texture and likely aiding in heat dissipation. The overall color is a uniform light gray, with subtle detailing on the buttons and controller. The object appears to be constructed primarily from plastic, with some metallic and electronic components likely inside. Its compact, boxy form is designed to sit on a flat surface, such as a shelf or entertainment center, and it is sized to be easily movable by a single person.
description: A rectangular, light gray CD player with a ribbed side design, front-facing disc tray, and a controller on top. The front features ventilation grilles, buttons, and ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the disc tray, ventilation grilles, control buttons, and ports, with the controller visible on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed texture and the controller resting on the flat top surface.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view, showing additional ventilation and the overall boxy shape, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_3: Other side view, again emphasizing the ribbed texture and the flat, featureless side panel.
